entry.title: Re: Add EE ID # to the Performance Potential Matrix Export
entry.content: Thanks, Michael! I should update the post to let everyone know I submitted an influence request shortly after this post. Please consider voting on it 🙂 344963

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Rest API config display issue
entry.content:
Hello Dan,

I know this issue is recent and the team cannot promise resolve this but when the old REST was working I configure relative paths to accommodate multiple endpoint of the same database, e.g.: my.api/communication/all and my.api/communication/user, both endpoint retrieve a list of record and I set the relative path like this: my.api/communication/{path} to set the path when making the API call.
But since the old API stop working this issue also crashses when building the application because os the same relative path, the error below is from a error log I got after trying build to web:

...
Error: Command failed with exit code 1: node --max-old-space-size=12000 /app/current/node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build
⚠ Invalid next.config.js options detected:
⚠ Invalid input at "env.supportRelativePaths"
⚠ Expected string, received boolean at "env.supportRelativePaths"
⚠ Expected undefined, received boolean at "env.supportRelativePaths"

How can I proceed?

entry.title: Re: Business Rules (on object, Save) not being triggered for Imports.
entry.content:
Hello,
Will you be able to share how the child object is configured, like the data type of the XYZ. And a screenshot of the import file.

BR,
Namratha

entry.title: Re: Quering document lines in user define values
entry.content:
Hi Matija,

Here is a screenshot from the moment I get the error message. I'm trying to get data from the line ALQC-002, and the field is "Suma Asegurada" which has at the moment running the query the value 1000. I'm not sure what you mean by the form being open tho. And the field I'm running the query in is "Monto del Alquiler".

Regards,
Santiago

entry.title: Re: Can't we use the same source objects if it is already...
entry.content:
That's also a problem for us.

Fortunately it should be solved soon, have a look at the following roadmap item:

Allowing the reuse of source data sets in multiple replication flows (Planned for Q2 2025) 

I hope that it will also allow to load the same object from the same source system in two different replication flows.

entry.title: Re: Create custom tab in XD02/XD03 transaction
entry.content:
1. Read the old answers.
  2. Create a search help for your customer table (SE11).
  3. Append your search help to DEBI (this can be done in SPRO or SE11).

entry.title: Re: "IS ASSIGNED" doesn't work after dynamic ASSIGN (in a...
entry.content: "could anyone find an example for the SAP statement "If a static assignment is not successful"? Thank you! " The second example under https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abapassign_mem_area_static_dobj.htm ?

entry.title: MRBR not releasing invoice after accepted usage decision on re-delivered goods (ECC EHP7)
entry.content:
Dear consultants,

I’m facing a situation involving SAP ECC (not S/4HANA) — specifically:

SAP ECC EHP7 FOR SAP ERP 6.0
Component versions:

  • SAP_APPL 617 0003 (SAPKH61703) — Logistics and Accounting

  • SAP_FIN 617 0003 (SAPK-61703INSAPFIN)

Let me explain the full scenario for better understanding (at the end I’ll also reference related discussions I’ve already reviewed, which were useful but didn’t lead to a resolution).

🧩 Business Scenario

Step 1: A purchase order is created for 2,000 units.
Step 2: The vendor delivers the goods. A goods receipt (MIGO 101) is posted, which triggers a quality inspection lot. The stock is now under “Quality Inspection.”
Step 3: An invoice (MIRO) is posted for the full 2,000 units. The invoice is blocked for payment since the usage decision in QM is still pending.
Step 4: The inspection lot is processed in QA32, and a rejection usage decision is posted via QA11. This triggers a 122 movement, returning all 2,000 units to the vendor. Stock is cleared accordingly.
Step 5: The vendor re-sends the full quantity. Another goods receipt (MIGO 101) is posted against same PO, and a new inspection lot is created.
Step 6: A positive usage decision is recorded for the new lot.
Step 7: A background job runs MRBR daily, which should release the blocked invoice now that the quality approval is in place — but this does not happen. MRBR still shows the invoice blocked due to Quality Inspection.

🔍What I’ve already checked

  • I will attach screenshots of movements and relevant tables.

  • This system does not have the automotive solution activated. (I mention this because a related discussion references inbound delivery statuses in that context.) Community link - How to close inbound status open after quality reject

  • Another thread from 2010 discusses a similar issue: MM Invoices not automatically released with MRBR One of the replies is marked as a solution, but I haven’t been able to reproduce the logic — or perhaps I misunderstood it.

❓My questions

  • What could be causing MRBR to still see a quality block even after the second (accepted) inspection lot?

  • What else can I check in terms of invoice history, logistics invoice verification settings, or inspection lot references?

  • Could this be related to the fact that the original invoice refers to the first GR (that was returned)? If so, what’s the correct process to handle this case?

 

Screenshots:

Any insights or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

—
Waldo

entry.title: Periodic Time Account Update Profile DOESN'T allow PAYOUT?
entry.content:
Hello expert @Volker_Ruof 

A client is asking that at the end of every flex period (monthly) the not used balanced of the working time account must be paid out.

But I tried by period end rule, doesn't let me and neither does through the Periodic Time Account Update Profile configuration and the time account is permanent one.

Is there any workaround? Or does the pay out need to be manually done every month?

Best regards,

Daniela Pontes

entry.title: I have requirement of restricting the user to change the other companies posting period from ob52
entry.content:
Hi,

I have requirement of restricting the user to change the other companies posting period from ob52. When the restricted user tried to select the other Posting period variant, system should restrict him.  

For example below 0001 and 0002, if the restricted user try to select the 0002 and click apply, the user should not allow to go next screen. 

Am not looking based on authorization group, restriction should happen from the selection "psting period variant" field.

Expecting advice from experts. 

Regards

Hashir

entry.title: Is there any way to integrate MS Project with SAP Cloud ALM?
entry.content: I would like to know if there is any existing method or recommended approach to integrate Microsoft Project with SAP Cloud ALM, in order to enable seamless synchronization of project plans, tasks, and progress tracking between the two platforms.

entry.title: Re: BP error - Township has no entry
entry.content: An entry is required in field township

entry.title: Re: MRBR not releasing invoice after accepted usage decis...
entry.content:
Hello @waldo 

Check the note 1879336 - MRBR - Automatic release not working for quality inspection - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA

Cause
The GR-Based IV flag is not set in the PO so the system cannot know which GR has been approved and which has been rejected.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Argentina Electronic Invoice - RG2904
entry.content: For RG2904 check OSS notes 1537823 and 2370724

entry.title: SAP CAPM Development - Calling New Page from Action button
entry.content:
Hi,

I am creating a CAP Project using List Report with Object Page. I have 3 entities, the parent entity, child entity and another entity associate to the child. On the object page, is it possible that via action button, we will call another page or popup to maintain entity 3 (associated entity of child entity)? In the page map, I could not find the option to create a new page either.

entry.title: Re: SAP, Curiosity & Me — Waldo’s Story
entry.content:
Hi Katherine,
Thanks so much for the warm welcome! 😊
It really brought back memories reading that note from Caroleigh and the old team — I still remember how special it felt.

To be honest, I don't feel quite at the level of the SAP Champions or Mentors — not yet, anyway! 😅
I used to be a lot more active years ago, but the platform has changed so many times... from SDN to SCN, then blogs, now community — I kind of lost track along the way.
Everything looks different now, and I’m slowly trying to find my way back 😄

Thanks again, and it's great to be reconnecting!

Warm regards from Argentina
—Waldo

entry.title: Re: Filtering of cluster table through include program from SLT

entry.title: Re: "IS ASSIGNED" doesn't work after dynamic ASSIGN (in a...
entry.content: Thank you very much. My wording was excessive, I meant that there should be a kind of spiderman alert, not that it's wrong, but it could be wrong, so it should be double checked (especially inside a loop). Thank you for the example (I notice that the field symbol is unassigned implicitly if the static assign fails).

entry.title: Rating Source from Variable Pay shows unrated
entry.content:
Dear Community,

me again with a variable pay issue - disclaimer: I already found a workaround, but I would like to understand the behavior.

We have a variable pay template in which we are getting the results from PM from the goal section.

Settings:

It worked correctly in the years before.

For this year we changed the calculation in the goal plan. Previously the field rating in the goal plan was filled by an MLT. Now we changed the calculation that the rating field is now filled based on different condition with the autopopulation feature in the goal plan.

Since this change I just retrieve "unrated" in the VP plan, even though the field "rating" is filled correctly:

Here is the goal plan with rating:

Do you have any idea why it works with MLT in the goal plan but not with autopopulation? Both features are calculating the rating field.

As a workaround, I’ve implemented the standard field “done” in the goal plan. This field is populated by a calculation that sets “done” equal to “rating”. Then, in the VP, I switch to using “Percent Done (Complete)” as the rating source, which gives me the correct results.

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Maintain PIRs doesn't save PIRs
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm uploading PIRs with Fiori app.

Are 1114 items.

First stesp ( upload file) was done ok, and I see all the items , but when I press "save" a progress bar is showing the progres.. after ( 55%) show this strange error

is there someone that know this error and whe I can see the log to understand what happened ?

Best regards

Gildo

If you can't find the answer there, create a case - our team will be happy to help you.

entry.title: Re: MRBR not releasing invoice after accepted usage decis...
entry.content:
Thanks for this note., but the note said:

" (...)

Cause

The GR-Based IV flag is not set in the PO so the system cannot know which GR has been approved and which has been rejected."

 

Just to be clear, the PO set was:

entry.title: Re: Maintain PIRs doesn't save PIRs
entry.content:
Hello @egil63 

See the note 3285620 - FAQ: App "Maintain PIRs", point 8

The number of the requirements plan starts with letter, "I", "P" or "V". In SAP S/4HANA systems requirement plan number might not start with any of the listed letters. Note 2784646 provides with a sample report, which you can use to migrate already existing requirement plan numbers.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: In Rewards and Recognition, how to hide the Award Value from the Nominator after award approval?
entry.content:
Hi @MeghaSadhotra,
I have taken a look and see that we can hide the award amount through using field permissions on the spotAward object within the assigned role-based permission.


For example, the below role is assigned to the Manager Charles. Through award history for the team, this not visible per the permission.


If the nominator is on a different RBP and we dont have the field level permission on, we can see the amount.


When creating an award through the program we are still able to select an award amount and also note, if you are using certificates the value will show in the history view within the pdf via the token.

Is this something you've tried? If you have attempted to hide the physical column on the spotAward object, then this will lead to error's within the UI as this call is part of the main API query to retrieve award information.

Thanks!

Any idea where it could come from?

entry.title: Boosting ABAP Development in Eclipse with Vrapper
entry.content:
If you're an ABAP developer who loves the modal editing power of Vim, Vrapper is a fantastic plugin to bring that efficiency into your Eclipse workflow. This tutorial walks you through configuring Vrapper for ABAP development with some handy shortcuts tailored specifically for SAP ADT (ABAP Development Tools).

🛠️ What is Vrapper?

Vrapper is a Vim emulation plugin for Eclipse. It brings the Vim keybindings you know and love into Eclipse, helping you keep your hands on the keyboard and your workflow blazing fast.

See it in action:

📦Installing Vrapper

  1. Open Eclipse and go to Help → Eclipse Marketplace.

  2. Search for Vrapper and install it.

  3. Restart Eclipse after installation.

  4. Enable Vrapper with Ctrl+Alt+V or through Window → Vrapper → Enable.

🧾 Configuring Vrapper for ABAP

To customize your Vim experience in Eclipse, Vrapper reads from a .vrapperrc file placed in your user home directory.

Here’s a recommended .vrapperrc configuration optimized for ABAP development:

set ignorecase                   " Enable case-insensitive search
set hlsearch                     " Highlight search results
set incsearch                    " Show search results as you type
set clipboard=autoselectplus     " Integrate clipboard with system

" Custom Eclipse actions mapped to Vim commands

" :a activates the current ABAP object
eclipseuiaction a com.sap.adt.activation.ui.command.singleActivation

" :aa activates all inactive ABAP objects
eclipseuiaction aa com.sap.adt.activation.ui.command.multiActivation

" 😮 opens the ABAP search dialog
eclipseuiaction o com.sap.adt.ris.search.ui.callSimpleSearch

" :e executes the ABAP object (e.g., programs, classes)
eclipseuiaction e com.sap.adt.sapgui.ui.launchExecutableObject

" := formats the selected block (or current block if none selected)
eclipseuiaction = com.sap.adt.tools.abapsource.ui.prettyPrintBlock

" % jumps to the definition or matching block (like F3)
noremap % <Plug>(eclipse-motion:com.sap.adt.tools.abapsource.ui.navigateTo)

" Cancel search highlight with ESC
map <ESC> :noh<ENTER>

🚀Handy Vrapper Shortcuts for ABAP Workflow

Command Vim Key / Command Description

Activate Object:aActivates the current ABAP object
Activate All:aaActivates all inactive objects in the project
Execute Object:eRuns an executable ABAP object
Search: oOpens the ABAP search UI
Format Block:=Formats the selected ABAP code block
Go to Definition%Jumps to the method, class, or variable definition (F3 equivalent)
Clear Search<ESC>Clears highlighted search terms

💡Pro Tips

  • You can add more eclipseuiaction mappings by identifying Eclipse command IDs eclipse SPIES (https://marketplace.eclipse.org/content/e4-spies#details).

  • Combine Vrapper with ABAP Favorites, Outline View, and Console shortcuts to fly through tasks.

  • Keep your .vrapperrc in version control if you work across machines or want to share your setup with teammates.

🧩 Conclusion

Vrapper bridges the gap between Vim productivity and Eclipse’s ABAP tooling. With just a few configuration lines, your Eclipse setup becomes much more keyboard-friendly and efficient.

Give it a try, tailor it to your needs, and elevate your SAP development experience

entry.title: Re: MR11 - GRIR open items display issue
entry.content:
SAP has responded to the OSS support ticket raised for the query and confirmed that this is a standard SAP behaviour for MR11.
 
When the LFBNR Reference (Reference Document Number + Fiscal Year of the Reference Document + Reference Document Item) match for a GR and IR; based on the standard S4 logic, the system proposes a single line for the combo in MR11.

entry.title: SwitchON SAP Americas
entry.content:
🚀 Don’t Miss Out! Register NOW for SwitchON SAP Americas – The Ultimate SAP Enterprise Architect Show! 🎉

Hey Team! 🙌

Exciting news! 🎊 The SwitchON SAP Americas event – The SAP Enterprise Architect Show – is happening, and you don’t want to miss it!

👉 Grab your FREE ticket now before they’re gone:
🔗 Click here to register

Here’s how to register:

  1. Click the link above.

  2. Choose the FREE ticket option.

  3. Fill out the quick form, and you’re in!

⚡️ If the free tickets run out, don’t worry – you can still buy one and keep growing, learning, and leveling up your SAP game. 💪

This is an incredible opportunity to connect with experts, explore innovations, and stay ahead in the SAP world. Let’s show up strong and make the most of it! 🌟

Let’s go! 🚀

Thank you,

Sreekanth 

SAP Lansing Community

Regards

entry.title: Re: hello, anybody home
entry.content:
today's the last (real not virtual) day, so what's up?

any news other than it's all automated and run by AI agents?

entry.title: Re: SAC - Difference between formulas using RESTRICT, LOO...
entry.content:
@andreasja_schneider 

RESTRICT respects the filtered member and ignores the calculation against the non restricted member where as LOOKUP will show a results against each member including the ones which are not being looked up.

Refer here for explanation.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/2784376d431e4a7da9564880dadb084d.html?q=LOOKUP#how-to-use-restrict-and-lookup

RESULTLOOKUP is even more restrictive as it requires looked member to be in drilled state in the table, else it will not show any results. Also allows only single members as lookup criteria.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/49f72825191b4c0780ebe5642b095de5.html?locale=en-US

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: SAP Commerce Cloud remote Cronjob execution through API
entry.content:
Introduction

Since, SAP Commerce Cloud version is not possible anymore to trigger cronjob externally with ant command. Unlike SAP Commerce OnPrem version where ant runcronjob was given this capacity. This article briefly gives some hints to do so.

Specification

Idea is to create two new OCC API interfaces:

  • HTTPS POST : /occ/v2/cronjob/{cronjobId}/execute
  • HTTPS GET : /occ/v2/cronjob/{cronjobId}/status

Execution

First interface is to trigger cronjob by given its id in URL path.

This POST method must be an asynchronous call.

Behind this call, request processing should be:

  • Check if the Cronjob {cronjobId} is in a ready state (if it exists and if it isn't running).
  • Create a new thread to trigger the CronJob execution.
  • Do not wait for the job to complete; return a response as soon as the job is executed.

Status

Second interface is to collect current cronjob status

This GET method is a synchronous call. It should not be requested under every 5 minutes. Refresh internal should not be lower than task.polling.internal

Implementation

OCC API

To create this to new interfaces, you just have to follow official documentions : Creating an OCC Extension for OCC Web Services.

Pay attention, to not set cache logic in those interfaces. Please find in below a pseudo code example.

@RequestMapping(value = "cronjob")
@ApiVersion("v2")
@Api(tags = "Cronjob")
public class CronjobController

@RequestMapping(value = "/{cronjobId}/execute", method = RequestMethod.POST)
public CronjobData executeCronjob(@ApiParam(value = ...

@RequestMapping(value = "/{cronjobId}/status", method = RequestMethod.GET)
public CronjobData getCronjobStatus(@ApiParam(value = ...

Once this API is implemented and deployed, it should be visible and testable at https://localhost:9002/occ/v2/swagger-ui.html

Service

Easiest way to trigger a cronjob execution asynchronously is to use bean taskService. This will create a new entry in table TaskModel and then TaskEngine will execute the job on the next refresh.

LOG.debug("Start CronJob by OCC API {} at {}", cronJob.getCode(), new Date(currentTime));
final TaskModel executeTask = getModelService().create(TaskModel.class);
// set runner
executeTask.setRunnerBean(ExecuteCronJobTaskRunner.RUNNER_ID);
// now
executeTask.setExecutionDate(new Date());
// pass cron job as context item
executeTask.setContextItem(cronJob);
// set ode id / group
executeTask.setNodeId(cronJob.getNodeID());
executeTask.setNodeGroup(cronJob.getNodeGroup());
taskService.scheduleTask(executeTask);

Security

EndPoint SAP Cloud Portal

This API should be deployed on BackgroundProcessing service. For that, you can update manifest.json

"aspects": [
{
webapps":[
"name": "backgroundProcessing",
"properties": [
{
"name": "commercewebservices",
"contextPath": "/occ"
},
{
"name": "oauth2",
"contextPath": "/authorizationserver"
},

IP Filter Sets should be setup to allow only IP from Cronjob orchestrator. 

OAuth

You have to declare a new application in SAP Commerce Cloud to authorize those OCC API interfaces. See official documentation about : Configuring OAuth Clients

This new client must have the role ROLE_TRUSTED_CLIENT. This will allow external Cronjob orchestrator to access on this Cronjob execution API services. See official documentation about : OCC Calls Security

@RequestMapping(value = "cronjob")
@ApiVersion("v2")
@Api(tags = "Cronjob")
public class LaPosteCronjobController

@Secured({ "ROLE_TRUSTED_CLIENT" })
@RequestMapping(value = "/{cronjobId}/execute", method = RequestMethod.POST)
public CronjobData executeCronjob(@ApiParam(value = ...

@Secured({ "ROLE_TRUSTED_CLIENT" })
@RequestMapping(value = "/{cronjobId}/status", method = RequestMethod.GET)
public CronjobData getCronjobStatus(@ApiParam(value = ...

Disable API on other EndPoints

On other Services (API, Backoffice), you should disable this OCC Cronjob API to avoid malicious or erroneous use. See official documentation about : API EndPoint Deactivation

Conclusion

As we have seen, OCC API can be used also for machine-to-machine communication. And we minimal effort, it is possible to trigger Cronjob execution remotely. 

If you need to enter in more detail or/and need more support for your business, please don't hesitate to contact SAP Expert Services.

entry.title: Offer letter text and tokens are appearing as red color
entry.content: offer letter text and tokens are appearing as red color. Is any specific reason being there or its functional change.

entry.title: How to find the actual distance for a Visit if OutOfRangeCheckIn = yes?
entry.content:
In SAP Sales Cloud, when the Check-In Range control is activated, the system compares the check-in coordinates of a Vuisit with the predefined coordinates of the account. If the distance between these two points exceeds the allowed threshold defined in "Maintain Visit Check In Range", the system marks the check-in as OutOfRangeCheckIn = yes.

This is helpful for monitoring compliance — but what if you want to know the actual distance by which the check-in deviated from the expected location?

Unfortunately, the standard system does not store the exact number of meters between the check-in point and the account's location. It only flags whether the check-in was in range or not.

entry.title: Re: Rating Source from Variable Pay shows unrated
entry.content:
Hi @Gunnar92 

I've come across this limitation before where auto-population impacts how ratings are retrieved. Not sure how I fixed it and no time to dig in my email and archives. Your workaround sounds good.

As to Why, you would need to create a support ticket for that so it gets answered by product and/or engineering. The fact that auto-population doesn't require a manual action on the MLT field (values get defaulted) maybe ? not sure.

Thanks
Xavier

entry.content:
Great article!

It provides overview of all the main functionalities of GATP.

entry.title: The value REBV is blank in WB2R_BUSVOL

What Are we missing? we have standard SAP settings only under which the business volume is getting calculated.

entry.title: Re: The value REBV is blank in WB2R_BUSVOL

VWB2_MKPF_MSEG_1 

VWB2_RBKP_RSEG_1

VWB2_EKKO_EKPO_1

entry.title: Re: How to create and use your own ATC check variant in ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi @Ram_peddireddi ,

it looks like you have not licensed CVA checks (under "Security") category. Please remove these checks from your custom check variant while creating the copy of ABAP_CLOUD_DEVELOPMENT_DEFAULT or license the CVA checks accordingly.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

For the moment it possible in chart but not for tables.
Is it planned to be added at tables level ?

kind regards

entry.title: Re: express document "update was cancelled" error
entry.content: The express error comes only when the system is not able to update some table or there has been an entry missing while updating the table. Which transaction you are getting this error in the system?

entry.title: Re: Configuring Product Vs Truck Incompatibility in SAP T...
entry.content:
Hi@ karthikeyan3991

Yes, you can use Transportation Groups to group similar products and Vehicle Types or Vehicle Groups for trucks.

entry.title: Re: 2025 Sapphire Selfies with Bluebeard
entry.content: Pre-session inception style pic with @anita_riegel @DanielleLarocca and a post session group selfie

entry.title: Re: Amount In LC- Goods Receipt (Asset Purchase Order (PO))
entry.content:
Standard Ways to View/Track GR Amount (Before IR) for Non-Valuated Asset POs:
Unfortunately, there is no standard SAP report or direct table entry that will show you the valuated GR amount for "GR non-valuated" items before the Invoice Receipt. This is by design, as the valuation is explicitly deferred to the IR.

However, you can track the expected value or the quantity received through standard means:

Purchase Order Item Details (ME23N/ME22N):

You can always see the PO quantity and net price at the item level. While this isn't the GR amount, it's the expected value for the goods received.
The PO History tab will show the Goods Receipt (movement type 101) with the quantity, but the "Amount in LC" field will be blank or zero for the GR line if it's non-valuated. The amount will only appear once the IR is posted.
Asset Explorer (AW01N):

For asset POs, the asset master record is updated. While the value isn't capitalized until IR, you might see the quantity of the asset increase or a reference to the PO.
However, the "Posted Values" section will only show the capitalization amount after the invoice.
Standard PO List Reports (ME2M, ME2N, ME2L):

You can run these reports to see the PO quantities and open quantities. You can filter by account assignment category 'A'.
Again, these reports won't show a valuated GR amount for non-valuated items before IR.

entry.title: Re: SAP Occupational Health (1812 SP02) in SAP S/4HANA Cl...
entry.content:
Hi Paulo, you can implement Occupational Health on its own taking into consideration you need HCM integration.

Integration

  • You must have installed the following SAP components in order to be able to use all the Occupational Health functions:

    • Personnel Administration

      You require master data from the Personnel Administration component such as name, first name, date of birth, and personnel number (for the United States, you also need the social security number) in order to use employee data.

    • Organizational Management

      The system uses organizational units (object types) from Organizational Management. You must therefore make sure that positions, jobs, and tasks are created there.

    • Recruitment

      You need master data from Recruitment such as name and first name in order to use applicant data.

    • SAP Business Partner

      You need master data from the Business Partners component such as name and first name in order to use data for external persons (for example, customers).

Where the integration between workplace safety and OH comes is where you would like to recommend protocols based on a person's exposure.  As an example, when a risk assessment identifies a high risk rating like for noise induced hearing loss, you would like to have the system proposed the applicable 'hearing loss' protocols in OH to the individuals that belongs to the same SEG (similar exposure groups).  Same goes for any agent that a risk assessment can be done on like an exposure to a chemical.

See more information in the helpfile:  Recommending Health Surveillance Protocols | SAP Help Portal 

Also, the Injury/Illness Log that falls under Incident Management can form part of the OH solution.  More information in the helpfile Injury/Illness Log | SAP Help Portal

Furthermore helpfile on the OH solution here:  SAP EHS Management for SAP S/4HANA, Occupational Health | SAP Help Portal

Hope this gives a little bit more clarity.

entry.title: Can we remove "Send Reminder" button in Team View?
entry.content: Is there any way to remove/hide this button from Team view?

entry.title: Re: Allocation of Budget - different legal entities on 1...
entry.content:
Hi @Joe0603 

 

Try using Budget Grouping by Legal Entity and see how that goes. If you want to enforce that planners cannot overspend on one vs the other then you will have no choice but to build different budgets with different custom columns for both enveloppe and spent calculations. Which has its drawbacks too. 

 

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear @Gerhard_Welker 

Hope you are doing well. 

I've already asked the question in the community, and I've put the settings our customer is requesting below: 

"In the S/4Hana public cloud 2SL, we need to implement an intercompany ( International and domestic )  flow that can automate this process :

The company " A" creates a sales order for a subsidiary ( The Company "B")  with the entire process (sales order, delivery, customer invoice), this automatically creates a purchase order on the subsidiary's side (The company B) , and therefore an automatic charge to the invoiced subsidiary (accounting entry, etc.)."


I've found a video that shows that the 1MX scope item enables automatic creation of the purchase order and our customer is asking us to use this process to trigger a workflow when the purchase is created.

Have you or anyone in the SAP community already set up this flow with a workflow when the purchase order is created at the invoiced company?
Thank you for your feedback and your invaluable help on this subject.

Best regards, 

Mouna

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: Seamless Planning with Datasphere & SAC: Seamless Planning in the Cloud?
entry.content:
@dirkfrick , Thanks for sharing your views on Seamless planning. Could you please shed some light on the performance aspect?

Assuming Data Actions, Multi Actions, Data locking etc. will continue to be created and configured in SAC and only the corresponding Data (SAC Data Models, SAC Dimension Tables, Currency Tables etc.) is physically stored in Datasphere space(s), will the primary CPU / Memory usage occur in SAC or Datasphere in case of Data Action and Multi Action execution? 


I do understand that utilisation occurs in both systems but which system should be considered primary from a resource consumption perspective?This will provide a guidance to sizing and effective design of data actions/multi actions for seamless planning. I couldn't find any references in SAP blogs or standard help.

Although it doesn't matter to the End User (Planner/Inputter), it does make a difference to tech folks and system owners from a design and cost perspective.

Regards,

Sai Kiran Reddy Arva

entry.title: Re: change PO item short text when transferring shipment cost

Júlia

entry.title: Hey , Please can we delete a chart of account in SAP public cloud ?Thanks
🇦🇺 Australia Payroll Update for End of Financial Year 2025
entry.content:
Join us for an invaluable opportunity to stay informed about the End of Financial Year (EoFY) payroll changes, PayDay Super and other future payroll developments.

Key highlights of this year's meeting:

  • Essential EoFY 2025 Payroll Update: Learn what SAP will deliver for end of year, changes to Lump Sum E and more. Be fully prepared for the changes taking effect on July 1st, 2025.
  • Expert Presentation by Deanne Windsor on PayDay Super: Deanne will provide a comprehensive update on PayDay Super, planned for a start date of July 1st, 2026. SAP will follow this with proposed high level changes to ensure customers can deliver reporting changes.

Agenda at a glance:

  • SAP Update – SAP Australia
  • PayDay Super  – Tambla

Speakers:

  • Matt Voce, Localization Product Manager, SAP Globalization
  • Deanne Winsor, STP Lead, Tambla 

Join here

entry.title: Re: PR to PO quantity conversion issue
entry.content:
Hello, 

Do you have mainteined maximum or minimum order quantity? Or please check if you have batch quantity roundings maintained for lower quantity. It seems like problem with roundigs or quantity of order. 

Also check the direction of conversin, maybe theres something regarding that way FT -> m and for example setting m-> FT will work properly. 

Please let me know if non of this helped. 

Reagrds, 

Jagoda

entry.title: Re: Trying to send user ids to punch out catalog

Hello, 

In Purchasing, the equivalent BADI for SRM's BBP_CAT_CALL_ENRICH is MMPUR_CAT_CLL_ENRCH. For any other additional information regarding the catalog enhancement, please refer to the cookbook attached in the KBA 2214564.

Best regards, 
Tatiana

There is only one point which I could not able to achieve. The PR would be having attachments which I have to send it to PROCOL as http link as shown below in a variable of the nested structure shared by PROCOL.

Is it possible that the image attachment which was associated with the PR would be shared as http link by passing into the structure?

entry.title: Re: Costing sheet not calculating the Overhead amount whe...

But the PRODH instead of PRDOH was assigned, so this caused the issue in TST system because KP26 in TST was with PRDOH, the AT was rectified and issue got it fixed.

entry.title: DRTM Performance Review
entry.content:
Hello All,

I would like to know about setting up the DRTM process for Performance Review forms in recurring way that will automatically purge the PM forms.

Today when I launched manually, I get multiple errors like below:

  • The form is used in calibration[TemplateName:1, SessionName: XXX]
  • This form is referenced by compensation/variable pay form(s) thus can't be purged. Form Name(Document Id)(Template Id) - 2017 H1 Bonus Scorecard - MyPerf YYYY)
  • This form is referenced by employee history records of variable pay plan(s) for whom only bonus calculation has been done thus can't be purged. Plan Name(Plan Id)(User Id)(Start Date)(End Date) - (2021 H2 Bonus Scorecard - MyPerf)(ZZZZ)
  • This form is referenced by variable pay template thus can't be purged. Template Id – 1003

Fixing these errors would be a purely manual process, moreover I am unclear on unlinking them from existing Variable Pay or Salary form, from existing Calibration session, from Variable Pay History data. There seems to be no KBA on this process.

Can you please advice.

I am also curious to know about how other customers are using this tool with recurring automated process.

Thanks,

Priya Pen

entry.title: Re: Invoice receipt quantity doesn't match Concur
entry.content:
Hello, 

How do you create this invoice? Because if you look at the flow the system takes under consideration that this 1PC was recevied. When you create invoice to PO, you have possibility to change the quantity received, so it might be partial invoice. But in your case, the system looks like it takes the quantites automatically, but the values are wrong.

You might have some problems with integration with Concur, because it looks like on an invoice net amount is equal to quantity. Please verify your integration settings. 

Reagrds, 

Jagoda

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to integrate MS Project with SAP Clo...
entry.content:
follow-up questions to help clarify:

✅ What we know:

  • SAP Cloud ALM REST APIs: You’ve shared the API Hub package which includes endpoints for tasks, requirements, test cases, etc.

  • SAP Help Documentation: This guide explains authentication and API usage well.

  • You're referencing Microsoft Project: Possibly to sync project data like tasks or timelines with SAP Cloud ALM? is MP Server? 

  • You’re asking whether it’s going to be an offline integration or not.

🤔 A few questions to guide the next step:

  1. What exactly are you trying to integrate?

    • Do you want to sync project tasks, track milestones, or update statuses between MS Project and SAP Cloud ALM?

  2. Is Microsoft Project Server on-premise or online )?

  3. Do you already have a middleware or iPaaS solution (e.g., SAP Integration Suite, Power Automate, etc.)?

  4. Will this be a one-time sync, scheduled batch job, or a real-time integration?

🧠 Ideas based on common patterns:

  • If you want offline integration, you could export from MS Project (e.g., XML or CSV), transform the data, and then push it using SAP Cloud ALM APIs.

  • If you're thinking live or semi-automated integration, something like a custom app or using Power Automate (for online MS Project) could call SAP ALM APIs periodically.

  • Authentication is OAuth 2.0 with client credentials for SAP Cloud ALM, so make sure your integration handles token management.

entry.title: Re: [Train-The-Trainers] SAP Signavio en Español - Inscripciones aquí
entry.content:
Espero vuelvan a tener un evento de signavio pronto.

 

saludos

entry.title: Time type group container/collector - Cross year cumulating counting overtime hours
entry.content:
Hi, 

We need to control the accumulation of overtime hours during transition period, so that the accumulated hour count is not reset on January 1st of the following year, but rather continues to counting/accumulate with the number of hours it has brought since December 31st of the previous year, so that it is properly factored. Until the end of the year, the accumulated hours are correctly determined, however, when the year ends, the hours accumulated until December 31st of that year are not being transferred to January 1st of the following year.

For example, employee:

  • has accumulated 20 hours of overtime work on December 31st
  • on January 1st of the following year he does another 4 hours of overtime work.
  • On January 1st, the system restarts the counting of overtime hours starting at 4h, instead of counting 20h+4h, to continue accumulating the counting of hours and, later, factoring these.

It was suggeste to use the implementation of TOIL accounts. The overtime will be transferred to those accounts and those accounts can be configured in different ways to cover several requirements:

If the requirement is that the overtime should be transferred to the time account and there is no so to say end date until which this needs to be used, the customer should use a permanent time account type as TOIL account.

If the requirement is e.g. that the overtime can be used in the current year, the customer should use a recurring time account type. For a recurring time account type the customer can also define a bookable offset (an end date until which the balance can be used). As well for a recurring time account there is a process called Period-End-Processing. With this the customer can decide at the end of the bookable end date for each time account, what should happen: Either the balance is set to 0, or the full or partial balance, which is not yet used is transferred to the next years time account. 

However, with TOIL accounts cumulate number of hours, whenever overtime hours are registered and this is not according to legislation Código do Trabalho – https://diariodarepublica.pt/dr/legislacao-consolidada/lei/2009-34546475).

Also, generation of Time accounts of overtime compensation follow these conditions:

- Compensation rest quotas are only generated from the moment in which you reach 1 full day of rest in the accumulated number of hours off. They must not be generated with less than 1 full day (8h).

- When transitioning from one year to the next, ensure that balances from the previous year are transferred to the current year, continuing to accumulate until reaching 1 day.

- The absence of compensation rest can only be generated after the indicated rule has been complied with, that is, if the accumulated number of hours off reaches 1 full day of rest.

- The start date of the time account corresponds to the date on which the right to compensatory rest is generated.

- The employee will have the possibility of enjoying this day of rest until April 30th of the following year.

- The compensatory rest quota must always consume the open quota first, with the oldest validity start date, and which still has a valid deduction end date.

So with these conditions, we cannot create a permanent time account, nor a TOIL account, nor a recurring time account indicating Period-End-Processing because these do not meet the requirements above.

We must achieve an automatic detection of the number of hours accumulated until the last day of the end of the year and, somehow, have this value as the initial counter for January 1st of the following year, so that it continues to accumulate the hours of that year.

How can system enable continuing counting hours cumulated from the last day of the previous year to the 1st of January of the following year.

Kindly advise.

Best regards

entry.title: Availability control not triggering for Commitments in 1NT Projects in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi!

I am working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and have configured the Availability Control Profile. The control is working properly for actuals; however, it is not being triggered for commitments.

 

I would like to know:

What should I assign in the Semantic Tag in order to cover the entire procurement cycle, including both Purchase Requisitions and Purchase Orders?

 

For your information, I have the scope item 2IE (Project Control - Procurement Integration) activated.

 

Thank you for your assistance.

 

Best regards,

Alejandro

entry.title: Re: SAP Embedded TM single journey E2E process along with integration SD-MM-FI-CO-CCM: Part I
entry.content: Appreciate this, Good Information!! Waiting for other blogs as well!!

entry.title: Re: RECN entries in SVT confirmed table
entry.content:
Hello

we are not using SAP standard solution. They SAP is using this "RECN". never understood. If i remember correct: the SAP standard limitation is: they store data only back to at max 90 days.

As you clearly know: as long as we are in the "planned" phase you will find data in CCRCT_SOPL.

The CCRCT_SOLO contains a reference to the "material document"

The issues is: in theory you can have many relevant data. I never have understood how SAP would like to use the "RECN" in CCRCT_SO as it is NOT part of the key.

But you have BADi etc. to enhance the process if needed. Check for reference (if really needed): https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/e3e7c06560a54d14ba7f4c52a86635da/83a6ce5314894208e10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US

Here you will find the "90 day" limitation story

I wish you the best

C.B.

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-q-a/sap-ehs-svt-display-confirmed-quantity-per-order-in-cbrc20/qaq-p/13769399

entry.title: Re: RECN entries in SVT confirmed table

Hello

and by the way: never received an issue in this thread https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/svt-test-confirmed-quantities/qaq-p/348278

Nearly similar topic

C.B.

entry.title: Unable to add discount condition type to the purchase inforecord during creations or modification
entry.content:
Hello to everyone,

I' m trying to add my custom condition type to the condition tab of the purchase inforecord but this the situation:

When I clicked on the conditions tab during the ME11 transaction this is what the system showed.

If you see there isn't the possibility to add a new condition type. In my case I want to add a % discount.

This is a SAP S4/HANA 2023 SP02.

 

I always workfed in a situation like this:

In this SAP environment (SAP S4/HANA 2020 initial pack) when I clicked on the conditions button during the ME11 transaction the system showed me this tab when I was able to insert different conditions.

 

Why this behavior by the system? How can I add a discount during the purchase inforecord creaton?

 

Thanks in advance,

Nicola
